reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Physical Education (B.P.Ed.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: LNIPE, one for all, all for one.

review_content.Placements: Mini internships are provided by the institution itself for 30 days, during which we have to go to local schools and teach students March past and mass demonstration. We also receive a stipend for that. In the 4th year, we have to complete a 45-day internship at schools or other places of our choice, and we may or may not get a stipend there. We have to do the internship as physical education teachers.
review_content.Infrastructure: In LNIPE, you have to stay in hostels, you cannot opt for staying outside during your Bachelor's and Master's degrees. The social life is very inclusive, with intramurals taking place all around the year, and seniors and juniors live like siblings. There are 5 hostels for UG boys and 3 for UG girls. Outings are allowed only on Saturday and Sunday for girls, while boys can go whenever they want, to be honest. Classrooms are well-lit, and there is enough space for every student. Wi-Fi facility are available in both the college buildings and hostels. Classrooms consist of smart boards in addition to green boards and whiteboards.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Physical Education (B.P.Ed.) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: The Best Physical Education and Sports College.

review_content.Placements: The highest package is 9 lakh p.a, the average package offered is 6 lakh p.a, and the lowest package offered is about 3.5 to 4 lakh p.a. Private schools, Army schools, and the topmost schools of the country recruit from here. The best thing is that the internship is compulsory for all. In the 6th semester, students are allotted schools by the college for a 1-month internship. In the 7th semester, students choose their own internship and decide which school to do it in, whether in any school of India or abroad. The college sends offers to the schools where students want to do internships. The top roles offered in this course are physical education teacher.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Physical Education (B.P.Ed.) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: A good college for physical education.

review_content.Placements: Actually, there is no placement in our college but in every KVS exam and interview, our college staff will be there, and also for the assistant professor job or coach vacancy in our college. There will be preference for our college students; most of the staff are passed out from this college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is very good, like class rooms, a football field, a hockey field, a multipurpose hall auditorium and also a big library with wifi AC and also a study room. Also, the hostel is not that advanced, but it's also good, like lot of free place are there, that is good.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Physical Education (B.P.Ed.) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Best college of physical education all over Asia.

review_content.Placements: An average of 50% of students get placed every year. The average package is around 5 to 6 lacs per annum. Private schools and colleges come every year to recruit students. After completing the 3rd year, the college sends all the students on an internship programme to different schools.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has advanced technologies for doing practical work in the field of physical education. It has its own big library with foreign journals and books that are not easily available. The classroom has good furniture and a digital class board for advanced learning. The food at the hostel is very good in comparison to other colleges. The college has every sports field and piece of equipment that you would have heard of.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Physical Education (B.P.Ed.) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: I have given an honest review and reasonable answers.

review_content.Placements: Almost everyone gets a job after the course because the college has a reputation in India. The highest under the lowest average package is like 45,000 amount and the maximum is about 350,000 monthly. If I talk about companies, there are no companies. If any person gets into Government schools and becomes teachers or for a long period, he becomes what she becomes a professor according to their abilities.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is not that good because it is old. When the college was founded and built, the infrastructure has not changed since then. It is not that good for facilities and it is not that eye-catching for the students. Sometimes it feels like if an earthquake comes, it is going to collapse.
